headline: 5 Solid Stocks to Boost Your Portfolio as Retail Sales Continue to Surge
summary: Retail sales rose in June as online spending surged, highlighting AMZN, FIVE, DLTR, TGT and TJX as retail stocks to watch.

headline: Five Below Jumps 41% in a Year: Should You Still Buy the Stock?
summary: FIVE outpaces peers with a 41% one-year gain as strong sales, expanding stores and higher fiscal 2026 guidance support its growth story.
